hero_subtitle: SFTY supports institutional compliance by maintaining secure, role-based audit logs and evidence preservation within private deployments tailored for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit trails weaken without controlled deployment
problem_description: Institutional compliance teams struggle to maintain evidence integrity and clear access governance when audit logs sit across external or cloud systems. This creates challenges for defensible compliance review, bank due diligence, and regulatory inspection readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY maintains role-based access, audit logs and evidence integrity inside a controlled deployment environment to support institutional teams with defensible compliance records and bank due diligence readiness.
workflow_title: From deployment controls to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY preserves audit logs, access permissions and decision records within on-premise deployments to maintain secure, traceable and compliant enterprise workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented evidence. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY preserves audit evidence and decision history within on-premise deployments, connecting provider outputs into a governed, defensible compliance layer for institutional workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in preserving audit-ready evidence and governance within private deployments to meet institutional compliance and bank due diligence standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how audit logs record compliance decisions securely

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects providers, policies and workflows into an auditable, scalable platform tailored for regulated institutional clients in digital asset markets.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY preserve audit trail evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY records decision logs, case history and provider outputs within evidence packages, preserving audit trails in line with enterprise readiness and review requirements.
faq_3_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_3_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and connects outputs across KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening systems into one structured workflow.
faq_4_question: How does on-premise deployment support security?
faq_4_answer: On-premise deployment enables role-based access governance, secure audit logs and controlled environment configuration to meet institutional security and governance standards.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, orchestrating their outputs without replacing any compliance or risk vendors.
final_title: Review on-premise audit trail with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY preserves audit logs, role-based access and evidence integrity in private deployments for institutional compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
